title: Prompt Lifecycle, Monitoring, and Production Capstone · Contract Workshop
summary: Ship and maintain a cross-provider prompt system with regression evidence. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a production prompt portfolio and release gate while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Store owners, versions, model assumptions, templates, and evaluation links in a prompt registry.
Block prompt releases on material deterministic, rubric, safety, or human-review regressions.
Monitor outcome, refusal, tool, latency, cost, and drift signals without logging sensitive content unnecessarily.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.prompt:
# Cross-agent prompt portfolio
# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.

steps.title: Commit to the mission model
steps.instruction:
Use a changed workshop case derived from this module: prompt production capstone. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

content.title: Worked case pattern

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: prompt-portfolio-defense-11d74n" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Portfolio Defense into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
Evidence: prompt-portfolio-defense-11d74n
Goal: [replace with one observable outcome]
Context: [replace with decision-relevant facts]
Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

stimulus.title: Portfolio Defense failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed
lines.text: A portfolio of successful screenshots proves transferable prompt skill.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Defend prompt design choices with evidence across Claude, Codex, changed cases, and limitations.

options.text: Keep the plausible output and hide the assumption to avoid confusing the stakeholder.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
Reject the unsupported conclusion, name the violated Portfolio Defense condition, repair the responsible layer, and rerun the boundary trace.

steps.title: Defend the transferred model
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Portfolio Defense applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Defend prompt design choices with evidence across Claude, Codex, changed cases, and limitations.
